message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceStyle vertical
skinparam actorStyle circle

actor Webブラウザ
participant CCM GUI (Web)
participant CCM GUI (WebSocket)
participant CCM SDK (IPC)

note right of CCM GUI (Web)
{
  "command": "NetworkInfo",
  "type": "notify",
  "data": {
    "ID": "xxx",
    "CellularInfo": [
      {
        "SignalStrength": "...",
        "SignalStrengthUnit": "...",
        "Operator": "...",
        "PLMN": "...",
        "Band": "...",
        "CellID": "...",
        "CellIID": "...",
        "AirInterface": "...",
        "Manufacture": "...",
        "ModelName": "...",
        "IMEI": "..."
      }
    ],
    "QosInterfaceType": {
      "key1": "val1",
      ...
    }
  }
}
@endnote

Webブラウザ -> CCM GUI (Web) : NetworkInfo
CCM GUI (Web) -> CCM GUI (WebSocket) : ネットワーク情報変更通知 [notify]
CCM GUI (WebSocket) -> Webブラウザ : 1秒間隔で保持データを画面に表示
CCM GUI (Web) -> CCM GUI (WebSocket) : ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信 (RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)
CCM GUI (WebSocket) -> CCM SDK (IPC) : ネットワーク情報変更通知 受信 (RegistRecieveNetworkInfoHandler)
@enduml
